CustomField.description: Used in the search layout to display additional information about the Work Item
CustomField.formula: Subject__c + ': ' + Project__r.Name + IF(NOT(ISBLANK( Feature__c )), ' / ' + Feature__r.Name, '') + IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Project_Phase__c)), ' / ' + Project_Phase__r.Name, '')
CustomField.label: Search Information
